summary: Reactions System comprehensive testing complete. All features working correctly: 3 reaction buttons (Support/Useful/Verified) on action cards, reaction toggle on/off, trust score calculation (1+2+5 weights), disabled buttons for non-logged users, profile trust_score aggregation.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for reaction buttons and trust scores
Optimistic updates work correctly - UI updates immediately then syncs with server
Trust score calculation correct: Support=1, Useful=2, Verified=5
Profile trust_score aggregates from all user's actions correctly
Reaction buttons properly disabled when user not logged in
seed_data_creation: Backend tests use existing actions in feed, toggle reactions to verify weights
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reactions system fully functional. First action in feed has Support=1, Useful=1, Verified=1 (trust_signal=8). Profile shows 4 stat cards: Trust Score, Actions Posted, Impact Score, Verified. Test user has trust_score=8 in profile.

features_verified.1_feed_3_reaction_buttons: PASS - Support (Heart), Useful (ThumbsUp), Verified (ShieldCheck) buttons displayed on each action card
features_verified.2_logged_in_toggle_reactions: PASS - Clicking reaction toggles on/off, button shows active state (colored) when reacted
features_verified.3_reaction_counts_update: PASS - Count updates optimistically then syncs with server (e.g., 1 → empty on toggle off)
features_verified.4_trust_score_per_action: PASS - Trust score badge shows correctly calculated value (Support*1 + Useful*2 + Verified*5)
features_verified.5_trust_score_zero_hidden: PASS - Actions with 0 reactions don't show trust badge (badge only visible when trust_signal > 0)
features_verified.6_non_logged_disabled_buttons: PASS - All 3 reaction buttons are disabled when user not signed in
features_verified.7_profile_trust_score_card: PASS - Profile page shows Trust Score stat card with flame icon (first position)
features_verified.8_profile_trust_aggregation: PASS - Profile trust_score aggregates from all user actions (tested: 8 → 13 → 8 on react/unreact)
features_verified.10_full_e2e_flow: PASS - Login → React → Count updates → Trust badge updates → Profile trust_score updates
